title: Help Registering for class
author: Jsauce910
body: Hey y’all, I’m trying to find “themes” on banner under the majors and stuff but I can’t find it. Do y’all know where I can find this stuff. I tried “LBST” or liberal studies but that wasn’t it either.

comments.author: j_wholey
comments.body: Hi! So this is the new set of Gen Ed requirements, which is why you would not see it under LBST. This is how you can find a listing of everything that would count for that requirement. Open Banner Self Service, Click "Student Services/Student Accounts", Click "Registration", Click "Look-up Classes to Add", Select the Fall 2023 Term, click submit, Click "Advanced Search", and then click in the subject box, select all (either CTRL/CMD+A or Click the top, hold shift, and click the bottom) and then under "Course Number" type the 1501, 1502, 1511, or 1512, and you will find ALL of the classes that meet that requirement! Let me know if you have trouble!

comments.author: DoctorMuerto
comments.body: Basically, each humanities (religious studies, philosophy, history, etc) and social sciences (anthropology, sociology, geography, etc) department will have courses with those numbers (1501/1502/1511/1512) that will count. So go find what might interest you!
